events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes honeycomb from missed vibration in concrete placement, observed in-service as an operating asset. Honeycomb indicates defective concrete placement due to inadequate vibration/consolidation. This is a non-compliant defect per ACI 301/304. Since it's in service, the component is degraded (reduced durability/strength at affected area). Risk depends on structural significance; honeycomb can expose rebar to corrosion and reduce strength. Decision: fail (non-compliant).
